# GarvinLabs — Complete Reference

> AI consulting and implementation for lean teams. Fixed price. 2–4 week delivery.
> Run by Garvin Chanderia. Based in Pune, India.
> Website: https://garvinlabs.vercel.app

---

## What GarvinLabs Does

GarvinLabs is an AI consulting and implementation practice. We help modern teams identify where AI actually moves the needle in their business — then build the systems that close the gap. Fixed price. No retainers. No strategy decks. Working systems, handed off with documentation.

The two problems we solve:

1. **"We have the tools, but nothing is connected."** Most teams buy Zapier, an AI subscription, and a CRM — then watch them sit separately. GarvinLabs builds the bridges.
2. **"We don't know where to start."** Most operators know AI should help them, but can't isolate which 3 processes are worth automating first. The Diagnostic answers that.

We don't do consulting that ends in a slide deck. Every engagement ends with running systems.

---

## Services and Pricing

### AI Diagnostic — $200 flat

**Delivered in 72 hours.**

- Written opportunity map of your ops or revenue stack
- Top 3 AI + automation opportunities, ranked by monthly dollar impact
- Effort and cost estimates per opportunity
- A scoped, priced recommendation for what to build first
- 15–20 minute Loom walkthrough you can share with your team

Required before any Build engagement. The Diagnostic is what enables fixed-price, fixed-date delivery.

---

### AI Implementation — $600–$2,400

**Delivered in 1–4 weeks.**

- Built around the Diagnostic's top-ranked opportunities
- 1–3 connected workflows: onboarding automation, win-back sequences, support triage, reporting pipelines, or whatever fits your stack
- Tools: n8n, WhatsApp Business API, Shopify webhooks, Claude/GPT, and your existing CRM or data layer
- Full documentation + live walkthrough on delivery
- Working systems — not spec documents

---

### Full System Build — $6,000–$12,000

**Delivered in 6–12 weeks.**

- Production-grade automation across your entire ops or revenue stack
- Complete automation layer, engineered for load and edge cases
- QA, monitoring, and runbooks for your team
- Integration with internal tools, CRMs, and data warehouses
- 30-day post-launch support window included
- Requires a completed Diagnostic

---

## Payment Terms

50% upfront, 50% on delivery. No retainers. No hourly billing. No surprise invoices. If a delivery date is missed, the balance payment is waived until the system ships.

---

## Ideal Client Profile

### Who This Is For

- **SaaS teams** spending hours on manual ops: onboarding checklists, support triage, weekly reporting, churn flags
- **D2C brands** with high cart abandonment, no automated win-back, or ad landing pages not tied to post-purchase flows
- **Founders and operators** who want AI in their stack but can't isolate where it actually helps vs. where it's a distraction
- **Businesses with existing tools** (CRM, Shopify, a helpdesk) who want them connected and automated — not replaced

### Who This Is NOT For

- Businesses with no digital operations or traffic
- Anyone expecting free consulting
- Teams looking for a retainer-based agency relationship

---

## Tools & Technology Stack

| Category | Tools |
|---|---|
| Workflow Automation | n8n (self-hosted or cloud) |
| Messaging | WhatsApp Business API |
| E-commerce | Shopify webhooks, Shopify Admin API |
| AI Layers | Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI) |
| Data | Supabase, Airtable, Google Sheets, CRMs |
| Delivery | Full documentation + Loom walkthrough |

Tools are chosen to fit the client's existing stack — not whatever is trending.

---

## Process

1. **Book the Diagnostic** — WhatsApp or email. Start with the $200 opportunity map.
2. **Receive your map in 72 hours** — Top 3 automation opportunities, ranked by impact, scoped for build.
3. **Choose what to build** — Fixed price, fixed scope, fixed date. No scope creep.
4. **Systems shipped** — Live walkthrough + full documentation on delivery.

---

## Proof and Track Record

- **25+ builds delivered** across SaaS, D2C, manufacturing, healthcare, and logistics
- **938 personalized pages** generated and automated for a single client outreach project
- **40% workflow turnaround reduction** at a Fortune 500 manufacturer using Power Automate
- **300+ organic downloads** for a consumer product built with zero ad spend (ThrottleApp)
- **26 business process documents** delivered for a manufacturing company, used daily
- **7 industries served**: SaaS, D2C, manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, financial services, real estate
- Repeat client who returned for a larger SaaS engagement after initial website delivery

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What exactly do I get for $200?**
A: A written opportunity map of your ops or revenue stack, the top 3 automation opportunities ranked by monthly dollar impact, effort and cost estimates per opportunity, a specific scoped recommendation for what to build first, and a 15–20 minute Loom walkthrough you can forward to your team. Delivered within 72 hours after our discovery call.

**Q: What tools does GarvinLabs build with?**
A: n8n for workflow automation, WhatsApp Business API for messaging, Shopify webhooks for D2C, Claude and GPT for the AI layers, and whatever CRM or data tool already lives in your stack. Tools are chosen to fit — not whatever's trending.

**Q: How fast can you deliver?**
A: AI Diagnostic: 72 hours. AI Implementation: 1–4 weeks. Full System Build: 6–12 weeks. These are hard timelines. If a date is missed, you don't pay the balance until it ships.

**Q: Do I need a Diagnostic before a build?**
A: Yes, for any Build engagement. The Diagnostic is what enables fixed-price quoting and fixed-date delivery. Without it, scope estimates are guesswork — and guesswork is how projects blow their budget.

**Q: What industries do you serve?**
A: SaaS, D2C/e-commerce, manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, financial services, and real estate. The automation problems (manual ops, disconnected tools, no win-back flows) are the same across industries.

**Q: Do you work internationally?**
A: Yes. Everything is delivered digitally. Clients are based across the US, EU, and India.

---

## About Garvin Chanderia

Garvin Chanderia is an AI consultant, builder, and founder based in Pune, India.

**Career background:**
- Product Consultant – Enterprise Architecture at Invecto Technologies (Oct 2025–present): ABACUS, ArchiMate, stakeholder demos, capability mapping
- BI Developer at Cummins India (Fortune 500, Jun 2024–Oct 2025): 25+ Power BI dashboards, SQL, Power Automate, led 6-member team, 40% faster workflow turnaround
- Founder of ThrottleApp (2024–2025): 300+ organic downloads, 200+ user interviews, Flutter + Firebase
- UX Designer at Eastern Royal Company (2021–2022): product vision, wireframes, user research

**Education & credentials:**
- B.Tech Computer Science (AI/ML specialization) — MIT ADT University
- Microsoft AI PM Professional Certificate
- Google UX Design Certificate
- Google Data Analytics Certificate
- Databricks Lakehouse Fundamentals
- Product School PAC

**Philosophy:** "Most teams don't have an AI problem — they have a prioritization problem. The Diagnostic answers: which 3 processes, in which order, with which tools. Then we build them."
